tasks.title: LiveKit-agent optional deps + package skeleton + data models
tasks.parallelism_notes: Foundation: adds the liveavatar-voice optional extra (P5) and the AvatarJobMetadata/StructuredOutputMessage Pydantic models every downstream task imports. NOT blocked by FEAT-242. All other tasks import from this one, so it runs first in the single Phase C worktree.

tasks.title: Structured-output → AgentChat UI bridge (OutputBridge)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Module 3 (P4). Depends only on TASK-001 models + the existing UserSocketManager.broadcast_to_channel (verified user.py:357). NOT blocked by FEAT-242. Sequential in the same worktree; TASK-003 imports it.

tasks.title: LiveAvatarAgent.llm_node ai-parrot bridge
tasks.parallelism_notes: Module 2 (llm-node-aiparrot-bridge). BLOCKED on FEAT-242: reuses SpeakableFlattener (speakable.py). Imports TASK-001 models + TASK-002 OutputBridge + ai-parrot ask_stream/AIMessage. Must validate the llm_node signature against the pinned livekit-agents (P5). Sequential.

tasks.title: LiveKit Agents worker + session pipeline
tasks.parallelism_notes: Module 1. BLOCKED on FEAT-242: reuses LiveKitRoomManager + LiveAvatarClient + LiveAvatarConfig/AvatarSessionHandle. Binds the TASK-003 LiveAvatarAgent as the LLM node; parses ctx.job.metadata via TASK-001 model. Validate LiveKit worker API against the pinned version (P5). Sequential.
